no_schedule_sub: Pick a mudra or ask the AI Guide first.

daily_routine_sub: We'll remind you every day at this time.
already_purchased_sub: You have already removed the ads forever.

ads_remove_success: Ads have been successfully removed forever!
restore_require: Please sign in to restore your purchase.
restore_success: Your Ad-Free experience has been restored!
no_purchase_sub: We could not find an active purchase for this account.
mudra-gyan_desc: The mudra of knowledge. Formed by touching the tip of the index finger to the tip of the thumb while the other three fingers stay extended. One of the most widely practiced mudras in meditation for calming the mind and improving concentration.
mudra-gyan_benefits_2: Calms the mind and relieves stress
mudra-gyan_inst_1: Sit comfortably with a straight spine.
mudra-gyan_inst_2: Rest the backs of your hands on your knees, palms up.
mudra-gyan_inst_3: Touch the tip of the index finger to the tip of the thumb.
mudra-gyan_inst_4: Keep the remaining three fingers gently extended.
mudra-gyan_inst_5: Close your eyes and breathe slowly and evenly.
mudra-prana_desc: The mudra of life force. Activates dormant energy in the body by joining the thumb with the ring and little fingers. Known for boosting vitality and reducing fatigue.
mudra-prana_inst_1: Sit in a comfortable meditative posture.
mudra-prana_inst_2: Bend the ring finger and little finger to touch the tip of the thumb.
mudra-prana_inst_3: Keep the index and middle fingers straight.
mudra-prana_inst_4: Rest your hands on your knees, palms facing up.
mudra-prana_inst_5: Breathe deeply and hold the position.
mudra-apana_desc: The mudra of digestion and detoxification. Joins the thumb, middle and ring fingers to support the body's elimination and cleansing processes.
mudra-apana_benefits_3: Reduces stress stored in the body
mudra-apana_inst_1: Sit comfortably with a tall spine.
mudra-apana_inst_2: Touch the tips of the middle and ring fingers to the tip of the thumb.
mudra-apana_inst_3: Keep the index and little fingers extended.
mudra-apana_inst_4: Place hands on the knees, palms up.
mudra-vayu_desc: The mudra of air. Balances the air element in the body by folding the index finger under the thumb. Used to settle restlessness and an overactive mind.
mudra-vayu_benefits_5: Brings a sense of grounded calm
mudra-vayu_inst_2: Fold the index finger so it rests at the base of the thumb.
mudra-vayu_inst_3: Press the thumb gently over the folded index finger.
mudra-vayu_inst_4: Keep the other three fingers straight.
mudra-shunya_desc: The mudra of emptiness. Created by folding the middle finger to the base of the thumb. Traditionally used for ear and balance issues and to quiet mental chatter.
mudra-shunya_benefits_5: Helps with feelings of being overwhelmed
mudra-shunya_inst_1: Sit in a relaxed meditative posture.
mudra-shunya_inst_2: Fold the middle finger toward the base of the thumb.
mudra-shunya_inst_3: Press the thumb over the folded middle finger.
mudra-surya_desc: The mudra of the sun. Folds the ring finger under the thumb to kindle inner fire, warmth and energy. Useful for sluggishness and low metabolism.
mudra-surya_benefits_5: Counters low energy in the morning
mudra-surya_inst_1: Sit comfortably with a straight back.
mudra-surya_inst_2: Fold the ring finger toward the base of the thumb.
mudra-surya_inst_3: Press the thumb over the folded ring finger.
mudra-dhyana_desc: The mudra of meditation. Both hands rest in the lap, right over left, with thumb tips touching. The classic gesture for deep meditation and stillness.
mudra-dhyana_inst_1: Sit in a comfortable cross-legged position.
mudra-dhyana_inst_2: Place the right hand over the left, palms up, in your lap.
mudra-dhyana_inst_3: Let the tips of the thumbs touch lightly.
mudra-dhyana_inst_4: Relax the shoulders and soften the gaze or close the eyes.
mudra-dhyana_inst_5: Breathe naturally and rest in stillness.
mudra-buddhi_desc: The mudra of mental clarity. Joins the thumb and little finger to enhance communication, intuition and clear thinking.
mudra-buddhi_inst_1: Sit comfortably with a relaxed posture.
mudra-buddhi_inst_2: Touch the tip of the little finger to the tip of the thumb.
mudra-buddhi_inst_3: Keep the remaining three fingers extended.
mudra-buddhi_inst_4: Rest hands on the knees, palms up.
mudra-prithvi_desc: The mudra of earth. Joins the ring finger and thumb to build strength, stability and grounding. Helpful for fatigue and feeling depleted.
mudra-prithvi_benefits_5: Counters chronic fatigue and low energy
mudra-prithvi_inst_1: Sit comfortably with a straight spine.
mudra-prithvi_inst_2: Touch the tip of the ring finger to the tip of the thumb.
mudra-prithvi_inst_3: Keep the other three fingers extended.
mudra-prithvi_inst_4: Place hands on the knees, palms up.
mudra-varun_desc: The mudra of water. Joins the little finger and thumb to balance the water element, hydrate the body and soothe the mind.
mudra-varun_inst_1: Sit in a relaxed, comfortable posture.
mudra-varun_inst_2: Touch the tip of the little finger to the tip of the thumb.
mudra-varun_inst_3: Keep the remaining fingers gently straight.
mudra-varun_inst_4: Rest hands on the knees, palms up.
mudra-apan-vayu_desc: Known as the heart mudra. Combines the gestures for the heart and air elements to calm the cardiovascular system and relieve stress and palpitations.
mudra-apan-vayu_inst_1: Sit comfortably and relax your shoulders.
mudra-apan-vayu_inst_2: Fold the index finger to the base of the thumb.
mudra-apan-vayu_inst_3: Touch the tips of the middle and ring fingers to the thumb.
mudra-apan-vayu_inst_5: Hold on both hands and breathe slowly.
mudra-adi_desc: The primal mudra. The thumb is tucked into the palm and the fingers wrap over it to form a soft fist. Relaxes the nervous system and deepens the breath, often used before sleep.
mudra-adi_benefits_2: Prepares the body for restful sleep
mudra-adi_inst_2: Tuck the thumb into the center of the palm.
mudra-adi_inst_3: Wrap the four fingers gently over the thumb.
mudra-adi_inst_4: Rest the soft fists on the thighs or beside you.
mudra-adi_inst_5: Breathe deeply and let the body soften.
chat_welcome: Namaste 🙏 Tell me what you're feeling — for example "I have anxiety", "I'm stressed", "I want better sleep", or "I have low energy" — and I'll suggest a mudra from your library.
no_matching_mudra: I don't have a matching mudra in your library yet.
update_reminder_sub: Adjust the time for your daily practice reminder.
welcome_sub: Ancient hand gestures, guided by AI. Everything works offline once set up.
want_practice: When do you want to practice?
enter_email_reset_password: Enter your email address to get a password reset link.
password_reset_link_sent: Reset link sent to your email!

name: Full Name
understand_you: This helps us understand you better and personalize your practice.

agree: By proceeding, you agree to our

why_we_ask_desc: Your current mood helps us recommend the perfect mudra practice to balance your energy and well-being.

plans_subtitle: Activate challenges to cultivate mental consistency. You can practice multiple plans at your own pace.
sleep_7_days_desc: Calm your mind and improve sleep quality with curated bedtime mudras.
anxiety_14_days_desc: Reduce stress, panic, and everyday anxiety using grounding hand gestures.
focus_21_days_desc: Sharpen your concentration, memory, and cognitive performance daily.
mark_as_done: Finish your session and mark it as done.
remove_routine_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this routine?
consistency_desc: Practicing daily helps build a habit and brings long-term benefits.
change_pause_anytime: You can change or pause reminders anytime.
practice_music_sub: Choose background music that plays during your practice sessions.

noti_no_sub: When you get notifications, they'll show up here.
notification_practice_body: A few mindful minutes keep your streak alive. 🧘

notification_daily_body: It's time for your daily mindful practice. Keep your streak alive!
mood_improvement: Your mood improved in <brand>{{percentage}}%</brand> of sessions!
mudra-pushpaputa_desc: The gesture of offering. The hands are brought together to form a hollow bowl shape, symbolizing gratitude, openness, and offering a handful of flowers to the Divine.
mudra-pushpaputa_benefits_2: Helps overcome fear and inner insecurities
mudra-pushpaputa_benefits_3: Alleviates negative emotions like anger or sadness
mudra-pushpaputa_benefits_4: Encourages gratitude and a positive mindset
mudra-pushpaputa_inst_1: Sit comfortably with your spine straight.
mudra-pushpaputa_inst_2: Bring hands together in front of the chest, little fingers touching.
mudra-pushpaputa_inst_3: Turn palms upward, cupping hands slightly like a hollow bowl.
mudra-pushpaputa_inst_4: Close your eyes, visualize offering flowers with devotion.
mudra-pushpaputa_inst_5: Hold the mudra and breathe deeply during meditation.
mudra-naga_desc: The gesture of the snake. It represents supernatural power, strength, and moving energy upward for deeper spiritual insight.
mudra-naga_benefits_1: Helps overcome life's obstacles and confusion
mudra-naga_benefits_2: Stimulates the throat chakra for better expression
mudra-naga_benefits_3: Encourages clarity, wisdom, and spiritual growth
mudra-naga_benefits_4: Boosts energy flow along the spine
mudra-naga_benefits_5: Balances prana to promote overall well-being
mudra-naga_inst_1: Sit comfortably and take a few deep breaths.
mudra-naga_inst_2: Place your right hand over your left hand.
mudra-naga_inst_3: Cross your thumbs over each other at the center.
mudra-naga_inst_4: Keep all fingers extended outward as much as possible.
mudra-naga_inst_5: Focus your mind on your breath or OM meditation.
mudra-bhairava_desc: The fierce manifestation gesture. Named after a powerful form of Shiva, it unifies inner strength and harmonizes the mind.
mudra-bhairava_benefits_1: Brings total positivity to your thoughts
mudra-bhairava_benefits_3: Calms an overactive or anxious mind
mudra-bhairava_benefits_4: Balances the left and right hemispheres of the brain
mudra-bhairava_benefits_5: Establishes a perfect foundation for deep meditation
mudra-bhairava_inst_1: Sit in a comfortable posture with eyes closed.
mudra-bhairava_inst_2: Place right hand on top of left hand, palms facing up.
mudra-bhairava_inst_3: Rest both hands comfortably at the base of the abdomen.
mudra-bhairava_inst_4: Keep your breath natural without forcing the speed.
mudra-bhairava_inst_5: Focus inward and clear your mind of thoughts.
mudra-anjali_desc: The prayer gesture. Pressing the palms together at the heart centers the soul, showing deep reverence, greeting, and respect.
mudra-anjali_benefits_1: Brings immediate emotional and mental balance
mudra-anjali_benefits_2: Stimulates the heart chakra to enhance connection
mudra-anjali_benefits_3: Quiets the mind and relieves mental stress
mudra-anjali_benefits_4: Improves daily focus, concentration, and memory
mudra-anjali_benefits_5: Promotes inner mindfulness and spiritual awareness
mudra-anjali_inst_1: Sit or stand with an upright, straight spine.
mudra-anjali_inst_2: Bring your palms together in front of your chest.
mudra-anjali_inst_3: Rest your thumbs gently against your breastbone.
mudra-anjali_inst_4: Extend fingers upward, keeping the touch light.
mudra-anjali_inst_5: Take deep, slow breaths and relax your mind.
mudra-linga_desc: The gesture of fire and heat. It interlocks the fingers to generate internal heat, boosting immunity and metabolic fire.
mudra-linga_benefits_1: Generates internal heat to combat colds and infections
mudra-linga_benefits_2: Promotes deep breathing and expands lung capacity
mudra-linga_benefits_3: Balances energy levels by uniting fire and air elements
mudra-linga_benefits_4: Fosters a very deep mind-body connection
mudra-linga_benefits_5: Assists in burning toxins and purifying the body
mudra-linga_inst_1: Find a comfortable seated position with a straight spine.
mudra-linga_inst_2: Clasp your hands together, interlocking all fingers.
mudra-linga_inst_3: Keep your left thumb pointing straight upward.
mudra-linga_inst_4: Encircle the upright left thumb with right thumb and index.
mudra-linga_inst_5: Relax your shoulders and focus attention on the breath.
mudra-brahma_desc: The gesture of all-pervading consciousness. Forming tucked fists against the abdomen helps channel full prana flow.
mudra-brahma_benefits_1: Promotes intense inner peace and mental tranquility
mudra-brahma_benefits_2: Enhances deep concentration and mental clarity
mudra-brahma_benefits_3: Increases awareness of subtle energy channels and nadis
mudra-brahma_benefits_4: Channels life force (prana) throughout the body
mudra-brahma_benefits_5: Boosts overall body vitality, health, and focus
mudra-brahma_inst_1: Sit in a meditation posture with your eyes closed.
mudra-brahma_inst_2: Place your thumbs at the base of your little fingers.
mudra-brahma_inst_3: Curl your other fingers over thumbs to make a fist.
mudra-brahma_inst_4: Join both fists together, palms facing upward to the sky.
mudra-brahma_inst_5: Press fists gently against the lower abdomen.
mudra-garuda_desc: The eagle gesture. It mimics cosmic wings to balance the air element, fostering a deep sense of inner freedom and vitality.
mudra-garuda_benefits_1: Balances the air (Vayu) element inside the body
mudra-garuda_benefits_3: Eliminates stagnant fluids and warms dry air in the body
mudra-garuda_benefits_4: Helps you effortlessly reach higher meditative states
mudra-garuda_benefits_5: Ignites digestive fire to improve stomach function
mudra-garuda_inst_1: Sit comfortably, close eyes, and take deep breaths.
mudra-garuda_inst_2: Place your right wrist on top of your left wrist.
mudra-garuda_inst_3: Interlock your thumbs tightly, palms facing upward.
mudra-garuda_inst_4: Spread remaining fingers wide to look like bird wings.
mudra-garuda_inst_5: Focus your mind entirely on breath or OM meditation.
mudra-kubera_desc: The gesture of wealth and wealth-manifestation. It channels focus and intent toward goals, abundance, and inner confidence.
mudra-kubera_benefits_1: Associated with attracting abundance and success
mudra-kubera_benefits_2: Significantly improves focus and overall mental clarity
mudra-kubera_benefits_3: Channels positive energy while clearing negative thoughts
mudra-kubera_benefits_4: Enhances self-esteem and quick decision-making confidence
mudra-kubera_benefits_5: Harmonizes and stabilizes internal energy flow
mudra-kubera_inst_1: Sit in a comfortable posture and close your eyes.
mudra-kubera_inst_2: Touch tips of index and middle fingers to thumb tip.
mudra-kubera_inst_3: Fold ring and little fingers flat into your palm.
mudra-kubera_inst_4: Perform this with both hands at the same time.
mudra-kubera_inst_5: Take steady breaths, focusing intently on your goals.
mudra-uttarabodhi_desc: The gesture of highest enlightenment. Interlocking the hands while extending index fingers dispels fear and raises spiritual energy.
mudra-uttarabodhi_benefits_1: Dispels fear and provides deep spiritual security
mudra-uttarabodhi_benefits_2: Illuminates higher knowledge and opens deep energy channels
mudra-uttarabodhi_benefits_3: Provides immense strength to easily face life's challenges
mudra-uttarabodhi_benefits_4: Brings ultimate spiritual peace and self-realization
mudra-uttarabodhi_benefits_5: Channels a powerful upward flow of vital energy
mudra-uttarabodhi_inst_1: Sit comfortably with eyes closed near your heart.
mudra-uttarabodhi_inst_2: Intertwine the lower three pairs of fingers together.
mudra-uttarabodhi_inst_3: Extend both index fingers straight up, touching at tips.
mudra-uttarabodhi_inst_4: Touch thumb tips together, pointing them downward.
mudra-uttarabodhi_inst_5: Visualize clean energy flowing upward along your spine.
mudra-rudra_desc: The powerful fire and earth gesture. Named after a dynamic aspect of Shiva, it charges the solar plexus to boost strength.
mudra-rudra_benefits_1: Provides a massive surge of vital energy to the body
mudra-rudra_benefits_2: Stimulates solar plexus chakra for personal transformation
mudra-rudra_benefits_3: Increases earth and fire elements for improved vitality
mudra-rudra_benefits_4: Aids metabolism and supports weight management goals
mudra-rudra_benefits_5: Generates internal heat to clear sluggish energy
mudra-rudra_inst_1: Sit in a relaxed asana and rest hands on knees.
mudra-rudra_inst_2: Turn palms upward and close your eyes.
mudra-rudra_inst_3: Touch tips of index and ring fingers to thumb tip.
mudra-rudra_inst_4: Keep middle and little fingers extended straight out.
mudra-rudra_inst_5: Perform with both hands simultaneously, breathing naturally.
breathing_premium_msg: Breathing exercises & guided meditation are premium features.
premium_upgrade_prompt: Unlock this feature with a one-time purchase.
schedule_description: Set daily reminders for your breathing and meditation practice.
schedule_saved_msg: Your daily reminders have been updated.
breathe_reminder_body: Take a moment for your breathing practice.
